_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of collection management processes, capabilities, and limitations.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model inventory management practices, including model tiering by materiality and complexity, risk classification, lifecycle tracking from development through retirement, and the documentation standards required at each stage.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-020 (AI, cosine: 0.531), DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.530).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.541). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, management]. DCWF-only terms [capabilities, collection, limitations, processes] vs WIDAI-only terms [classification, complexity, development, documentation, inventory, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.900 (P=0.934, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.067 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (95.8%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of collection management processes, capabilities, and limitations." and "Knowledge of model inventory management practices, including model tiering by ma". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.550 ≈ STS 0.541 (gap 0.009). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, management] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, management]. DCWF-only: [capabilities, collection, limitations, processes]. WIDAI-only: [classification, complexity, development, documentation, inventory, lifecycle].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 95.8% on Superset of classification. The matched KSA operates in a different professional domain than the obligation/competency requires. STS 0.541 passed the threshold but secondary signals contradict the match.
STS 0.541 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
